# Links and Images

## Inline Links

[Basic link](https://example.com)

[Link with title](https://example.com "Example Title")

[Relative link](./01-headings.md)

[Link to heading](./01-headings.md#heading-level-2)

## Reference Links

[Reference link][ref1]

[Another reference][ref2]

[Implicit reference][]

[ref1]: https://example.com "Reference 1"
[ref2]: https://example.com/page "Reference 2"
[Implicit reference]: https://example.com/implicit

## Autolinks

<https://example.com>

<user@example.com>

https://example.com/auto-detected (GFM autolink)

## Images

![Alt text for a placeholder image](https://via.placeholder.com/400x200 "Image Title")

![Small image](https://via.placeholder.com/50x50)

### Image as Link

[![Clickable image](https://via.placeholder.com/200x100)](https://example.com)

### Reference-style Image

![Reference image][img1]

[img1]: https://via.placeholder.com/300x150 "Reference Image"

## Special Link Cases

[Empty href]()

[Link with special chars](https://example.com/path?query=1&other=2#fragment)

[Link with spaces](https://example.com/path%20with%20spaces)

[Link with parentheses](<https://example.com/path(with)parens>)
